rationale.R1.2: The agent correctly identified a load-bearing contradiction in the design, specifically the per-node embedding contradicting the inductive claim.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the OGB-Arxiv/Products split definitions) and two minor issues (the existence of 'GraphSAGE-Abstain' and the formula for the coverage-risk objective).
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly covers exactly the agreed J*(d), but with one drift (mentioning OGB-Products without reporting a number).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free, but with one minor regression (the attribution sentence in the last paragraph being unsupported by a single comparison).
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide every non-cosmetic change with source and reason; some changes are mentioned as needing to be annotated.
